fAttackDashAcceleration.AltName: Melee attack control Walking attack movement acceleration [m/sec^2]

fAttackDashSpeed.AltName: Melee attack control Walking attack movement speed [m/sec]

fAttackDashRotSpeedMinBorder.AltName: Attack control Low speed turning judgment speed [m/sec]

fAttackDashRotSpeedMaxBorder.AltName: Attack control High speed turning judgment speed [m/sec]

fAttackDashRange.AltName: Melee attack control Walking attack attack range [m]

fAttackBackSwingSpeed.AltName: Close attack control Attack starting part speed multiplier [x]

fAttackFollowSwingSpeed.AltName: Close attack control attack end speed multiplier [x]

attackDashFailedCancel.AltName: Cancel flag when blade dash fails
